channel.title: Services on ENSŌ Psychologie
channel.description: Recent content in Services on ENSŌ Psychologie

item.title: Individual consultations
item.description: A space for reflection and support — to work through a difficult time, gain clarity or pursue personal development.

item.title: Psychological coaching
item.description: Goal-oriented support to strengthen your resources, clarify a direction and move forward concretely.

item.title: Drop-in sessions
item.description: A space to talk and find support at a specific moment — with no commitment to continue.
